title: Entity Minimap
description: Adds a cool entity radar which you can zoom in & out with, useful for finding players & other entities. Also shows all players in your render distance, what their holding, and how far away they are.
body:
# ThreatScope
When activated, it displays in real time nearby players & entities.

## /scope  
Toggles threat overlay. Shows sprinting, sneaking, weapon status, and health of players within render distance.  

## /scopemap  
Toggles minimap radar HUD in the top right. Shows entity positions around you, with players having more obvious icons.

## + / - keys  
Zoom in/out on radar to adjust the detection range.  

## Radar highlights:  
🟥 Players (big, red)  
⬛ Entities (small, gray)
